Why Choose Ramadan Bot?

Designed by Muslims, for Muslims seeking authentic spiritual growth.

Quranic Foundation

Every reflection is grounded in authentic Islamic teachings and Quranic knowledge.

Privacy First

Your personal data is secure. Only your name appears on shared flyers, never personal info.

AI-Powered

Advanced language models trained to understand Islamic context and spirituality.

Community Focus

Share your journey with family and friends. Inspire others through your consistency.

High Quality

1080x1080px flyers with professional design, ready to share on any platform.

Progressive Web App

Works on any device, offline capable, installable like a native app.

Frequently Asked

Everything you need to know about Ramadan Bot

Is Ramadan Bot free?+

Yes! You get 3 free AI-generated reflections per day. All features are included in the free version. No premium tiers required.

How does the AI generate reflections?+

We use advanced language models trained on Islamic knowledge, Quranic teachings, and Islamic scholarship. Each reflection is unique and spiritually meaningful.

Can I customize the generated reflections?+

Yes! You can provide custom hints or topics. You can also regenerate if you'd like a different reflection. You have 3 generations per day.

Will my personal information appear on shared flyers?+

Only your name appears on shared flyers. No email, phone number, or private data is exposed. Your privacy is our priority.

How do I share my flyers?+

Download the high-res image and share to WhatsApp, Instagram Stories, Twitter, Telegram, or email. One-tap sharing for most platforms.

What platforms does Ramadan Bot work on?+

It's a Progressive Web App (PWA) that works on any device with a browser. Install it on your phone like a native app for offline access.

Can I track my streak across devices?+

Yes! Log in with your PIN on any device and your streak, history, and preferences sync automatically.

Is my data backed up securely?+

All your data is stored securely with encryption. We use industry-standard security practices to protect your information.

Ready to Transform Your Ramadan?

Start creating personalized reflections today. Free to use, no credit card required.
